mapper.select: SELECT s.store_name, u.name as ownerName, s.business_hours, s.min_price, s.store_pic, s.holiday, s.state, s.location, s.detail_location, s.created_at, s.notice, s.business_number, s.store_tel, s.rating_avg, s.rating_count, s.order_count FROM store s JOIN user u ON s.owner_id = u.user_no WHERE s.store_id = #{id}

SELECT m.menu_id, c.category AS categoryName, m.name AS menuName, m.price, m.menu_pic, m.menu_info, m.soldout -- 품절 상태 FROM menu_category c JOIN menu m ON c.category_id = m.category_id WHERE c.store_id = #{id} -- 조회하려는 매장 아이디 ORDER BY c.category_order ASC, m.menu_order ASC

SELECT distinct s.store_id AS id, s.store_name AS name, s.min_price min, s.rating_avg avg, s.rating_count sum, s.order_count count, s.store_pic AS pic, s.state FROM store s JOIN store_category sc ON s.store_id = sc.store_id LEFT JOIN menu_category mc ON mc.store_id = s.store_id LEFT JOIN menu m ON m.category_id = mc.category_id LEFT JOIN category c ON c.category_id = sc.category_id
( m.name LIKE concat('%', #{searchText}, '%') OR s.store_name LIKE concat('%', #{searchText}, '%') OR c.category_name LIKE concat('%', #{searchText}, '%') )
ORDER BY CASE WHEN s.store_name = #{searchText} THEN 1 WHEN s.store_name LIKE concat(#{searchText}, '%') THEN 2 WHEN s.store_name LIKE concat('%', #{searchText}, '%') THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, s.order_count DESC

SELECT s.store_id AS id, s.store_name AS name, s.min_price AS min, s.rating_avg AS avg, s.rating_count AS sum, s.order_count AS count, s.store_pic AS pic, s.state FROM likedstore l JOIN store s ON l.store_id = s.store_id WHERE l.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY l.created_at DESC LIMIT #{startIdx}, #{size}
select count(1) from likedstore where user_no= #{userNo} and store_id=#{storeId}
mapper.delete: delete from likedstore where user_no= #{userNo} and store_id=#{storeId}
mapper.insert: insert into likedstore set user_no=#{userNo}, store_id=#{storeId}
mapper.select: SELECT s.store_id AS id, s.store_name AS name, s.min_price AS min, s.rating_avg AS avg, s.rating_count AS sum, s.state, s.order_count AS count, s.store_pic AS pic, (6371 * ACOS( COS(RADIANS(#{lat})) * COS(RADIANS(s.latitude)) * COS(RADIANS(s.longitude) - RADIANS(#{lng})) + SIN(RADIANS(#{lat})) * SIN(RADIANS(s.latitude)) )) AS distance FROM store s HAVING distance <= 3 ORDER BY distance ASC

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.rating, r.contents, r.photo, u.name AS userName, DATE_FORMAT(r.write_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS date, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(od.menu_name SEPARATOR ', ') FROM order_detail od WHERE od.order_id = r.order_id) AS menuName FROM review r JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = r.order_id JOIN user u ON u.user_no = o.user_no WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY r.write_at DESC
